hero.kicker: 資料治理 × 經營分析 × 團隊培訓
hero.heading: 把商業問題翻成可執行的數據系統
hero.subheading: 獨力治理集團級資料資產、修正財務歸屬邏輯，並把分析思維教給團隊的商業分析師。

items.label: 集團 BI 資產完成治理（Metabase／SQL 版本控制）
dbt models・集團資料平台首版上線
合約 BU 歸屬修正（占 24.6%，總額 delta = 0）
分析師培訓 Dashboard 教材（96 圖表・131 題）

contact.heading: 聯絡
contact.body: 若你在整理資料治理、經營分析或分析師培訓體系，歡迎直接來信。

opener.heading: AI 時代的分析師是轉譯者與策略師
opener.body: 在 AI 工具日趨強大的時代，數據分析的價值已不再是產出報表，而是詮釋與轉譯——我扮演數據與商業決策之間的「轉譯者」與「策略師」。這不是一句空話：從 AI 輔助的招募與培訓流程設計，到跨裝置 AI workflow 治理，我持續把 AI 工具轉化成可重複執行的分析與管理系統。

identity.heading: 身分
identity.background: 馬來西亞背景，長期在台灣工作
identity.languages: 中文 / 英文 / 粵語 / 馬來語（英語具備國際認證）

items.title: 市場與社群洞察
items.lesson: 從外部市場、競品與消費者洞察建立商業判斷的敏感度，學會把雜訊資料整理成可執行的策略建議。

items.title: 零售與顧問資料整合
items.lesson: 在跨系統驗證、經銷商協作與交接壓力中，學會用嚴謹的資料對帳降低企業級專案的風險。

items.title: 企業資料治理與經營分析
items.lesson: 學會一人扛起集團級 BI 資產治理，把財務與制度邏輯拆成可核對的機制，並把分析思維教給團隊。

items.title: 先釐清決策場景，才決定輸出形狀
items.body: 先看誰要做判斷、多常看一次、目前卡在哪裡，再決定分析要交付什麼形式——而不是先做報表再找人看。

items.title: 把定義寫進流程，不只是寫進文件
items.body: 有效的治理不是一份說明書，而是把商業定義、欄位邏輯與責任分工直接嵌進 pipeline 與監控機制裡，例如 ERP/Metabase 治理中的分層品質檢核。

items.title: 誠實面對數字的邊界
items.body: 我習慣明確標示哪些是已驗證的事實、哪些是推論、哪些仍待確認——寧可承認卡關，也不輸出虛假精確的結論。

mentoring.heading: 我也帶人
mentoring.body: 從 7 產業、96 張圖表、131 道練習題的分析師培訓 Dashboard，到約 6–7 位實習生的招募與 onboarding 流程設計，我持續把複雜的分析邏輯轉成別人能自己學會的教材與制度，而不只是自己會做。

workCases.heading: 工作案例深讀
workCases.intro: 情境 → 做法 → 可驗證結果，數字全部可回溯至專案資料，嚴守可公開範圍。

sideProjects.heading: Open Source & Side Projects
sideProjects.intro: 個人開發與維護的專案，涵蓋教學工具、環境自動化與互動式培訓教材。

resume.heading: 履歷
resume.intro: 網頁版履歷，內容與投遞用 PDF 同源，排版為網頁閱讀優化。

about.title: About | Lee Ping Hui

projects.title: Work | Lee Ping Hui

resume.title: Resume | Lee Ping Hui
resume.description: Full career timeline, skill matrix, and resume PDF download.

hero.kicker: Data Governance × Business Analytics × Team Enablement
hero.heading: Turning business questions into workable data systems
hero.subheading: A business analyst who single-handedly governs group-level data assets, fixes financial attribution logic, and teaches teams to think in data.

items.label: Group BI assets brought under governance (Metabase / SQL version control)
dbt models · first production launch of the group data platform
Contract BU attribution fixed (24.6% of total, zero-delta reconciliation)

contact.heading: Contact
contact.body: If you are working on data governance, business analytics, or analyst training systems, feel free to reach out.

opener.heading: An analyst in the AI era is a translator and strategist
opener.body: As AI tools grow more capable, the value of data analysis is no longer producing reports — it is interpretation and translation. I act as a translator and strategist between data and business decisions. This is not just a slogan: from designing AI-assisted recruiting and training workflows to governing cross-device AI tooling, I keep turning AI capability into repeatable analysis and management systems.

identity.heading: Identity
identity.background: Malaysian background, long-term based in Taiwan
identity.languages: Mandarin / English / Cantonese / Malay (English internationally certified)

items.title: Market & community insight
items.lesson: Built business judgment from external market, competitor, and consumer signals, learning to turn noisy data into actionable strategy.

items.title: Retail & consulting data integration
items.lesson: Learned to use rigorous reconciliation to de-risk enterprise projects under cross-system validation, distributor coordination, and handover pressure.

items.title: Enterprise data governance & analytics
items.lesson: Learned to single-handedly own group-level BI asset governance, break financial and policy logic into auditable mechanisms, and teach the underlying analytical thinking to a team.

items.title: Clarify the decision context before shaping the output
items.body: I first identify who is making the call, how often they need the signal, and where the current friction sits — instead of building a report first and looking for an audience after.

items.title: Write definitions into the workflow, not just the docs
items.body: Effective governance is not a manual — it embeds business definitions, field logic, and ownership directly into the pipeline and monitoring layer, such as the layered quality gates in ERP/Metabase governance.

items.title: Be honest about the limits of a number
items.body: I explicitly label what is a verified fact, what is inference, and what is still unconfirmed — I would rather disclose a blocker than output a falsely precise conclusion.

mentoring.heading: I also build people
mentoring.body: From a 7-industry, 96-chart, 131-exercise analytics training dashboard to designing recruiting and onboarding workflows for about 6-7 interns, I keep turning complex analytical logic into materials and systems other people can learn on their own — not just things only I can do.

workCases.heading: Work Case Studies
workCases.intro: Situation -> approach -> verifiable result. Every number traces back to project records and stays within publicly shareable scope.

sideProjects.heading: Open Source & Side Projects
sideProjects.intro: Personally built and maintained projects spanning teaching tools, environment automation, and interactive training material.

resume.heading: Resume
resume.intro: A web-native resume sourced from the same data as the submission PDF, laid out for on-screen reading.
